label: Uncertainty Sources
description: Normalized sources of uncertainty affecting confidence, applicability or execution readiness.
usageNotes: Use alongside certainty levels; uncertainty sources explain why confidence is not maximal.
One statement can carry multiple uncertainty source codes.

entries.label: Selection Bias
entries.description: Bias arising from systematic differences in who entered comparison groups.
usageNotes: Common in observational or non-randomized evidence.

entries.label: Confounding
entries.description: Distortion due to unmeasured or residual confounders.
usageNotes: Use for comparative observational evidence limitations.

entries.label: Statistical Imprecision
entries.description: Wide confidence intervals or insufficient event counts.
usageNotes: Use when effect estimates lack precision.

entries.label: Inconsistency
entries.description: Meaningful inconsistency across studies or subgroups.
usageNotes: Typical in systematic reviews and meta-analyses.

entries.label: Indirectness
entries.description: Mismatch between evidence and target population, intervention, comparator or outcome.
usageNotes: Should influence applicability and conflict resolution.

entries.label: Publication Bias
entries.description: Risk that published evidence is systematically unrepresentative.
usageNotes: Common in synthesis and early translational evidence.

entries.label: Heterogeneity
entries.description: Clinical or statistical heterogeneity that limits portability of pooled findings.
usageNotes: Different from inconsistency when variability is expected but operationally important.

entries.label: Operational Variability
entries.description: Variation in implementation capability across sites or teams.
usageNotes: Use when execution quality materially affects expected effect.

entries.label: Jurisdiction Mismatch
entries.description: Source recommendations were developed for a different legal or regulatory context.
usageNotes: Should lower readiness before local review.

entries.label: Evidence Decay
entries.description: Aging evidence with increased probability of being outdated.
usageNotes: Use when half-life or reappraisal thresholds are exceeded.

entries.label: Unknown
entries.description: Uncertainty source not yet classified explicitly.
usageNotes: Temporary fallback only; should be resolved during curation.
